mechanism: Nokia DCT4 baseband with an ARM7TDMI MCU core (~26 MHz core, 52 MHz memory interface) and ~4.5 Mbit internal SRAM. A general-purpose silicon microprocessor, orders of magnitude faster than the TI-82's Z80.

historical_notes.claim: Nokia DCT4 phones use an ARM7TDMI MCU core with a 52 MHz memory interface.
The Nokia 3590 is a monochrome AT&T/Cingular candybar GSM phone, FCC-approved April 2002.

usable_assumptions.confidence: estimate -- idle-on digital core+screen; a call spikes ~1-2 W into the RF amplifier
estimate -- ~26 MHz MCU core; 52 MHz memory interface is the cited figure
